contentList.content: On a miss, you can spend a <LSTag Type="ActionResource" Tooltip="SuperiorityDie">Superiority Die</LSTag> to add it to the result of the <LSTag Tooltip="AttackRoll">Attack Roll</LSTag>, possibly making it hit.
Add a <LSTag Type="ActionResource" Tooltip="SuperiorityDie">Superiority Die</LSTag> to your <LSTag Tooltip="AttackRoll">Attack Roll</LSTag>.
Swing your weapon in a rapid, sweeping arc to attack multiple enemies at once, dealing an additional [1].
